## What happened?

## Bug report

<!--
Generate with one of:

  yoloai --debug --bugreport safe <your command>
  yoloai sandbox <name> bugreport safe

Then paste the entire contents of the generated .md file below.
If the report exceeds 64,000 bytes, create a Gist and paste the link:
  gh gist create --public yoloai-bugreport-<timestamp>.md

If your bug involves proprietary code, sensitive paths, or other
information you don't want public, generate an `unsafe` report instead
and do not paste it here — share it privately instead (e.g. a secret
Gist: `gh gist create yoloai-bugreport-<timestamp>.md`) and link it,
or say so and a maintainer will follow up.
-->
